description_long: This object is a realistic representation of a male Mallard duck, featuring a smooth, streamlined body with a brownish-tan coloration and subtle feather texturing. The head is a vibrant, iridescent green with a distinct white ring around the neck, transitioning to a yellow beak. The body is elongated and slightly flattened, with a gently pointed tail and a rounded chest. The surface appears matte with some slight gloss on the head, mimicking the natural sheen of duck feathers. The object is solid and likely hollow inside, resembling a decoy or ornamental figure. There are no visible moving parts or openings, and the overall form is lifelike and proportionate.
description: A lifelike male Mallard duck with a green head, yellow beak, and brown body, featuring realistic feather texture and smooth contours.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the duck, highlighting the green head, yellow beak, and brown body.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the symmetrical shape of the head, the white neck ring, and the pointed beak.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the other profile of the duck with the same coloration and features.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the rounded back and tail, with the green head visible at the top.
